cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out when Andrew could have gone to the clothing store. So, the task is to determine the time window when Andrew was both free (not occupied with other activities) and the store was open. First, I need to list all the times Andrew was doing things as observed by others. Let's go through each person: 1. Andrew woke up at 5am. So he wasn't doing anything before that, but that's just the wake-up time, not an activity. 2. William saw Andrew playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, Andrew was at the tennis court. 3. Jessica saw him at the deli from 6am to 9am. That's a long time—buying lunch, so he was there from 6 to 9. 4. Tiffany saw him near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So 9 to 11, he was taking photos there. 5. John
